dealSummary: Dutch biotech group Leyden Labs raised €40 million from investors including the European Innovation Council Fund, Invest-NL and the Gates Foundation.
leadInvestors: the European Innovation Council Fund, Invest-NL, the Gates Foundation

dealSummary: Nebulock, the developer of a contextual security platform, received a $25 million Series A led by FirstMark.
Upside, which offers a housing stability platform, raised a $20 million Series A led by Aquiline.
